sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ طَارِقٌ بِذْرَةً غَرِيبَةَ الشَّكْلِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tarik je pronašao sjemenku čudnog oblika u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq found a strangely shaped seed in the garden.

sentences.arabic: زَرَعَهَا فِي التُّرْبَةِ وَسَقَاهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Posadio je sjemenku u zemlju i zalijevao je svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: He planted it in the soil and watered it every day.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ نَبَتَ نَبَاتٌ جَمِيلٌ بِأَزْهَارٍ بَيْضَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Sedmicu kasnije iznikla je lijepa biljka s bijelim cvjetovima.
sentences.translationEn: After a week a beautiful plant with white flowers had grown.

sentences.arabic: أَرَاهَا الْأَبُ لِجَارِهِمُ الَّذِي يَعْرِفُ النَّبَاتَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Otac ju je pokazao susjedu koji poznaje biljke.
sentences.translationEn: The father showed it to their neighbour who knows about plants.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْجَارُ: هَذَا يَاسَمِينٌ، رَائِحَتُهُ جَمِيلَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Susjed je rekao: Ovo je jasmin, njegov miris je veoma lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbour said: This is jasmine, its smell is very beautiful.
